# Kevala Home

> Free property tools and market intelligence for buyers and sellers in West Bengal, India. No login, no ads, official government data sources only.

Kevala Home builds free digital tools for the West Bengal real estate market — RERA verification, true cost calculation, and project search — plus sourced market intelligence on upcoming developments across Kolkata and West Bengal.

## Tools

- [WB RERA Check](https://wbrera.kevalahome.com/): Verify if a West Bengal real estate project is RERA registered and its current status (active, revoked, expired). Covers 4,300+ projects, sourced from rera.wb.gov.in.
- [Total Cost Calculator](https://cost.kevalahome.com/): Calculates the true all-in cost of a property purchase in West Bengal — stamp duty, GST, registration fees, and more — beyond the quoted price.
- [WB Project Finder](https://find.kevalahome.com/): Searchable map of RERA-verified real estate projects in West Bengal, filterable by district, project type, and possession year.

## Market Intelligence

- [Upcoming Real Estate Projects in West Bengal & Kolkata](https://www.kevalahome.com/upcoming-projects.html): Sourced data on Kolkata's growth corridors, metro expansion impact on property prices, and named upcoming projects with RERA status, updated periodically.

## About

- [Homepage](https://www.kevalahome.com/): Overview of all free tools and the data sources behind them.

All data is sourced from official government portals (WB RERA, rera.wb.gov.in) and publicly reported market research (Knight Frank India, JLL, Anarock). Kevala Home is not a real estate brokerage and does not charge for any tool or information on this site.
